headline: Why Your Boss Can't Blame You for a Trip and Fall
articleBody: Insurance adjusters love to say a fall was 'your fault' because you weren't looking. Don't let them bully you. In Utah and Idaho, workers' comp is usually no-fault, meaning it doesn't matter if you were clumsy. As long as you were working, you should be covered. If they're denying your claim based on 'negligence,' it's time to let a pro step in and fix it.
